questions.subject: pharmaceutics
questions.question: Suspensions question 1: Why is flocculation sometimes desirable in a suspension?
options: It can reduce hard cake formation and improve redispersion
It permanently dissolves all particles
It eliminates the need for preservatives
It guarantees sterility
questions.correctAnswer: It can reduce hard cake formation and improve redispersion
questions.explanation: Controlled flocculation forms loose aggregates that settle rapidly but can be redispersed more easily than a compact cake.
